summaryShort: Critical solder defect on PowerCore 500 at Line 2, Station 2 — worker reports very poor quality.
summaryLong: A worker at **Montage Linie 2, Station 2** reported a severe soldering defect on the **PowerCore 500**. The solder joints are described as looking like "der letzte Müll" (total garbage), indicating a critical quality issue. The worker expressed frustration that this is a recurring problem that has not been addressed despite prior reports. No immediate containment action was mentioned.

defect_code.source: komplette Scheiße beim Zusammenlösen ... das Zusammenlöten fehlerhaft

severity.source: das sieht aus wie der letzte Müll

keywords.source: Zusammenlösen ... das ändert sich aber nicht
